title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

title: [PR] fix(sse): model-only lockout for local provider 404
summary:
## Summary

When a local inference backend (oMLX, Ollama, LM Studio) returns **404** for an unknown model, OmniRoute locks the **entire connection** for 2 minutes — blocking all valid models on that connection. This is a critical reliability issue for local AI workflows.

**Bug reproduction:** Sendi

Local inference backends (oMLX, Ollama, LM Studio) have no health monitoring. When down, OmniRoute waits the full timeout before failing.

- **`src/app/api/monitoring/health

- The continuation logic was using an assistant message as the last message (prefill pattern), which only A

title: [PR] Feature/performance improvement
summary:
Address performance/bugs found

* Chat history gets messed up between characters if we try multiple chats (especially when we resize the screen, which triggers a chat history reload)
* Issues with accuracy. Once in a while, the recipe gets messed up (although very rare since we switched to Ollama
